channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Live Updates: Iran accuses U.S. of "grave violation" of ceasefire as Trump seeks "good deal or no deal" - CBS News
item.description:
1. Live Updates: Iran accuses U.S. of "grave violation" of ceasefire as Trump seeks "good deal or no deal"  CBS News
  2. Iran threatens retaliation after U.S. strikes in southern Iran  The Washington Post
  3. When Iran thumbs its nose at the ceasefire, the Trump administration shrugs  CNN
  4. Prospects fade for imminent end to Iran war as attacks restart  NPR
  5. Tehran labels US attacks ‘gross violation’, says it is prepared to respond  Al Jazeera

item.title: ‘Mind-bogglingly crazy’: Europe’s deadly, early heatwave is smashing records - CNN
item.description:

  4. A Spring Heat Wave is Breaking Records in the U.K., Spain and France  The New York Times
  5. Seven heat-related deaths in France as May records set in several countries  The Guardian

item.title: EU summons Russian envoy over threats against European diplomats in Kyiv - politico.eu

item.description:

item.title: Russia tells Marco Rubio U.S. citizens should leave Kyiv ahead of 'systematic' strikes on Ukrainian capital - CNBC

item.title: Attacks from residents complicate the fight against a rare type of Ebola - NPR
item.description:

item.title: ‘A very dangerous bluff’: Mark Carney warns of Brexit-like regret if Alberta leaves Canada - CNBC

item.title: Qatar emerges as key broker in US-Iran frozen funds dispute | Iran International - ایران اینترنشنال
item.description:
1. Qatar emerges as key broker in US-Iran frozen funds dispute | Iran International  ایران اینترنشنال

  4. Iran’s top negotiators travel to Qatar amid intensified efforts to secure deal  Financial Times
